ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to save API key secret:
ast.target: 无法保存 API 密钥：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无法重命名生成的笔记：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A friendly name to identify this connection.
ast.target: 用于识别此连接的友好名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add an OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes all providers, models, secret selections, and per-feature defaults. Saved obsidian secrets are not deleted.
ast.target: 移除所有提供商、模型、密钥选择和按功能设置的默认值。已保存的Obsidian密钥不会被删除。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: URL does not look like a YouTube link.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Anthropic: The `compactionControl` parameter is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use server-side compaction instead by passing `edits: [{ type: "compact_20260112" }]` in the params passed to `toolRunner()`. See https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction
ast.target: Anthropic: `compactionControl` 参数已弃用，将在未来版本中移除。请通过在传递给 `toolRunner()` 的参数中传递 `edits: [{ type: \"compact_20260112\" }]` 来改用服务器端压缩。详见 https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/compaction

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Knowledge note generated, but skipped renaming because the title is not a valid note name.
ast.target: 知识笔记已生成，但因标题不是有效的笔记名称而跳过重命名。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在获取播放列表视频…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Paste a YouTube video or playlist URL to continue.
ast.target: 粘贴YouTube视频或播放列表URL以继续。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter a destination folder, or switch to "current note".
ast.target: 输入目标文件夹，或切换到“当前笔记”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select an AI model, or turn off AI for transcript-only output.
ast.target: 选择一个AI模型，或关闭AI以仅输出转录文本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Enter manual instructions, or switch back to a built-in template.
ast.target: 输入自定义指令，或切换回内置模板。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cancel requested. Waiting for the running step to stop.
ast.target: 已请求取消。正在等待运行中的步骤停止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Multi-URL paste with editor target can't include playlists in per-video mode. Switch playlist mode to combined, switch destination to a folder, or remove playlist links.
ast.target: 多URL粘贴且目标为编辑器时，不能在逐视频模式下包含播放列表。请将播放列表模式切换为合并，将目标切换到文件夹，或移除播放列表链接。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Master switch for all AI features.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Create an AI-generated note body from a template or manual instructions.
ast.target: 根据模板或自定义指令创建AI生成的笔记正文。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pick a built-in template or write your own instructions for the AI.
ast.target: 选择一个内置模板或为AI编写您自己的指令。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Custom prompt. The video metadata block is still added automatically.
ast.target: 自定义提示词。视频元数据块仍会自动添加。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a TL;DR section in a summary callout.
ast.target: 在摘要标注框中添加TL;DR部分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a Mermaid mindmap, independent of the selected template.
ast.target: 添加一个Mermaid思维导图，独立于所选模板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add 3-7 verbatim quotes, independent of the selected template.
ast.target: 添加3-7条逐字引用，独立于所选模板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Embed the YouTube video, playlist video, thumbnail, or no media near the top of the note.
ast.target: 在笔记顶部附近嵌入YouTube视频、播放列表视频、缩略图或不嵌入媒体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Rename the destination note to the video or playlist title. Not applicable for multiple videos in one note.
ast.target: 将目标笔记重命名为视频或播放列表标题。不适用于一个笔记中的多个视频。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a YAML frontmatter block. Useful for note properties, Dataview, and search.
ast.target: 添加一个YAML前置信息块。适用于笔记属性、Dataview和搜索。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Comma- or space-separated tags added to the frontmatter. Example: YouTube, AI/summary.
ast.target: 添加到前置信息的逗号或空格分隔的标签。示例：YouTube, AI/summary。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Space- or comma-separated list. Allowed keys: title, aliases, source, channel, channelUrl, channelId, videoUrl, playlistUrl, videoId, playlistId, thumbnailUrl, videoDescription, uploadDate, videoCategory, durationSeconds, keywords, generated, videoCount.
ast.target: 空格或逗号分隔的列表。允许的键：title, aliases, source, channel, channelUrl, channelId, videoUrl, playlistUrl, videoId, playlistId, thumbnailUrl, videoDescription, uploadDate, videoCategory, durationSeconds, keywords, generated, videoCount。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Render the source block (title, channel, URL) at top or bottom.
ast.target: 在顶部或底部渲染源信息块（标题、频道、URL）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use the current note, append to the active note, or create notes in a folder.
ast.target: 使用当前笔记、追加到活动笔记，或在文件夹中创建笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Created automatically if it does not exist.
ast.target: 如果不存在则自动创建。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How transcript content appears in the generated note.
ast.target: 转录内容在生成的笔记中的呈现方式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When using the timestamped transcript, deep-link to the video at that time.
ast.target: 使用带时间戳的转录时，深度链接到该时间点的视频。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Auto picks any available transcript. Preferred tries your language first, then falls back.
ast.target: 自动选择任何可用的转录。首选会先尝试您的语言，然后回退。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Used when transcript language is set to preferred. Example: en, fr, ar.
ast.target: 当转录语言设置为首选时使用。示例：en, fr, ar。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Create a single combined note for the whole playlist, or one note per video.
ast.target: 为整个播放列表创建一个合并的笔记，或为每个视频创建一个笔记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Skip the video with a missing transcript, or stop the entire run.
ast.target: 跳过缺少转录的视频，或停止整个运行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a collapsible batch report showing completed, skipped, failed, and canceled runs.
ast.target: 添加一个可折叠的批处理报告，显示已完成、已跳过、失败和已取消的运行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Where to put the run report after all generations in a batch complete.
ast.target: 批处理中所有生成完成后，运行报告的存放位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If supported by the provider; 0 = deterministic. 0.3 (default) = focused. 1 = more varied.
ast.target: 如果提供商支持；0 = 确定性。0.3（默认）= 聚焦。1 = 更多变化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Increase for slow local models or long runs. 300 = 5 minutes.
ast.target: 为慢速本地模型或长时间运行增加此值。300 = 5分钟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-2 sentences capturing the single most important takeaway.
ast.target: 1-2句话概括最重要的核心要点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3-5 bullets covering tradeoffs and weak claims.
ast.target: 3-5个涵盖权衡和薄弱主张的要点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3-5 bullets with concrete anchors from the source.
ast.target: 3-5个带有来源具体锚点的要点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-2 sentences naming what the learner walks away knowing.
ast.target: 1-2句话说明学习者最终掌握的知识。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Concepts or skills the reader needs first.
ast.target: 读者首先需要的概念或技能。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 4-8个命名概念，每个概念附带一句话定义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Numbered walkthrough of the mental model.
ast.target: 心智模型的编号式分步讲解。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 带有可折叠提示答案的回顾性问题。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 5-7个原子化的、可随时回忆的要点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shapes assumed prior knowledge, and self-test difficulty.
ast.target: 塑造先验知识，并自测难度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every distinct claim with brief support.
ast.target: 每个独立的论点及其简要支持。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 提及的每个产品/库/服务。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 提及的每个人物及其角色。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每个定量主张及其背景。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shapes the level of detail preservation.

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-2 sentences naming the topic and central insight.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 规范定义 + 直觉理解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: What is NOT covered, to learn next.
ast.target: 未涵盖的内容，以及下一步学习方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shapes analogies, and depth of explanation.
ast.target: 塑造类比和解释的深度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This video's contribution to the inquiry.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The research question this video helps answer.
ast.target: 本视频帮助回答的研究问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every claim with explicit strength tag.
ast.target: 每个主张都带有明确的强度标签。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 演讲者提供的具体证据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gaps the speaker does not address.

ast.name: description
ast.source: What to do with this material.

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可进一步追寻的具体来源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The specific question you are investigating.
ast.target: 你正在研究的具体问题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: How aggressively the AI distinguishes asserted from supported claims.
ast.target: AI区分断言性主张与支持性主张的严格程度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1-2 sentences naming what is built and the core approach.
ast.target: 1-2句话点明构建内容和核心方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Strategy in a paragraph or 3-5 bullets.
ast.target: 策略，以段落或3-5个要点形式呈现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Numbered concrete steps. Each one sentence.
ast.target: 编号的具体步骤。每步一句话。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fenced blocks for code shown or described.
ast.target: 用于展示或描述的代码的围栏块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specific settings, env vars, or parameters discussed.
ast.target: 讨论的具体设置、环境变量或参数。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 提及的具体工具/库/框架。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pitfalls, edge cases, things that look right but break.
ast.target: 陷阱、边缘情况、看似正确但会出错的事物。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 未解决的实现不确定性。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Use video title as note title
ast.target: 使用视频标题作为笔记标题

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Provide specific instructions for the note...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 标题 频道 channelUrl videoId …

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Balanced summary, takeaways, where it applies, and limits. Best default.
ast.target: 平衡的摘要、要点、适用场景及局限性。最佳默认选项。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Notes for learning a topic: concepts, self-test, things to remember.
ast.target: 用于学习主题的笔记：概念、自测、需要记住的内容。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Extract every claim, tool, person, source, and quote worth keeping.
ast.target: 提取每一个值得保留的论点、工具、人物、来源和引述。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Topic reference, canonical concept, mental model, gaps to learn.
ast.target: 主题参考、规范概念、心智模型、待学习的空白。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Inquiry-shaped: claims, evidence quality, gaps, sources to chase next.
ast.target: 探究式：论点、证据质量、空白、下一步要追踪的来源。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Concrete steps, code, tools, and action items to act on the source.
ast.target: 具体步骤、代码、工具和行动项，以便根据来源采取行动。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Independent TL;DR generation, richer video metadata, and better combined playlist handling.
ast.target: 独立的 TL;DR 生成、更丰富的视频元数据以及更好的组合播放列表处理。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Better long-playlist runs, richer video metadata, AI-optional notes, and clearer provider/queue UI.
ast.target: 更佳的长播放列表运行、更丰富的视频元数据、AI 可选笔记以及更清晰的提供商/队列界面。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect to an AI provider like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or a local model via Ollama/LM Studio.
ast.target: 连接到 AI 提供商，如 OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini，或通过 Ollama/LM Studio 连接本地模型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No models added yet. Fetch them from the provider or add one manually.
ast.target: 尚未添加模型。从提供商处获取或手动添加一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No release notes are available for this version yet.
ast.target: 此版本尚无可用的发布说明。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有活动或排队的运行。
